day2_night_phone_1.name: Me
day2_night_phone_1.text: *The old school group chat. 'Read by 3'. Nobody replied. Two days now.*

day2_night_phone_2.name: Me
day2_night_phone_2.text: *I sent Minsu a message. 'Hey Minsu, I transferred and you haven't even hit me up lol'*

day2_night_phone_3.name: Me
day2_night_phone_3.text: *10 minutes later. The '...' indicator appeared. Minsu is typing.*

day2_night_phone_4.name: Me
day2_night_phone_4.text: *5 seconds. The typing indicator keeps blinking. Is he writing a long message?*

day2_night_phone_7.name: Me
day2_night_phone_7.text: *...What is this. The guy who normally starts with 'hey you idiot lmaooo' and a string of insults is being this stiff?*

day2_night_phone_8.name: Me
day2_night_phone_8.text: *'Yeah doing well.' ...That's what he picked after 5 seconds of typing?*

day2_night_phone_9.name: Me
day2_night_phone_9.text: *I replied. 'Why so formal lol, something up?'*

day2_night_phone_10.name: Me
day2_night_phone_10.text: *1 minute. 2 minutes. The typing indicator appears again.*

day2_night_phone_11.name: Me
day2_night_phone_11.text: *Minsu: 'Nah nothing's up lol just been busy'*

day2_night_phone_12.name: Me
day2_night_phone_12.text: *...Something about his tone feels different. Must just be busy.*

day2_night_phone_13.name: Me
day2_night_phone_13.text: *I put the phone down. The moon is out the window. Another notification goes off.*

day2_night_sea_1.name: Me
day2_night_sea_1.text: *Sea: 'Thanks for today too. For coming to the student council room.'*

day2_night_sea_4.name: Me
day2_night_sea_4.text: *I reply. 'I had fun today too. Good luck with sports day prep lol'*

day2_night_sea_5.name: Me
day2_night_sea_5.text: *Sea: 'Good luck? lol You're the one who has to help me'*

day2_night_sea_9.name: Me
day2_night_sea_9.text: *Sea: 'But you remember the promise from lunch today, right?'*

day2_night_sea_14.name: Me
day2_night_sea_14.text: *A message came through the Student Safety App.*

day2_night_eunsu_1.name: Me
day2_night_eunsu_1.text: *Eunsu: '{name}, you did well on your presentation today. You're adapting fast.'*

day2_night_eunsu_2.name: Me
day2_night_eunsu_2.text: *Eunsu: 'Can you stop by the teachers' office tomorrow? There's a document I need to check.'*

day2_night_eunsu_5.name: Me
day2_night_eunsu_5.text: *...The teacher even sends messages like this. My old homeroom teacher couldn't even remember my name.*

day2_night_flash_1.name: Me
day2_night_flash_1.text: *I lie under the covers and close my eyes.*

day2_night_flash_2.name: Me
day2_night_flash_2.text: *...Suddenly, an image flashed. Walking down this school's corridor. It's raining. My uniform is wet. Running with someone —*

day2_night_flash_3.name: Me
day2_night_flash_3.text: *Holding hands. A girl's hand. A cold hand.*

day2_night_flash_4.name: Me
day2_night_flash_4.text: *"This way" — someone's voice. One I feel like I've heard before.*

day2_night_flash_5.name: Me
day2_night_flash_5.text: *I opened my eyes. My heart is pounding.*

day2_night_flash_6.name: Me
day2_night_flash_6.text: *...What was that just now? It wasn't a dream, but an image surfaced. This school's corridor... as if I've walked it before. Running while holding someone's hand. A cold hand.*

day2_night_flash_7.name: Me
day2_night_flash_7.text: *...Eunsu? Her hand was cold when she patted my shoulder earlier. ...No, that can't be related.*

day2_night_flash_8.name: Me
day2_night_flash_8.text: *...It's probably because I'm still tense from the first day. My head is full of school images.*

day2_night_dream_1.name: Me
day2_night_dream_1.text: *I close my eyes again. This time, I fall asleep.*

day2_night_dream_3.name: Me
day2_night_dream_3.text: *A classroom. But not the current one. The desk arrangement is different. There's a date written on the blackboard but I can't read it.*

day2_night_dream_4.name: Me
day2_night_dream_4.text: *Someone is sitting in the front seat. Long hair. I can only see their back.*

day2_night_dream_6.name: Me
day2_night_dream_6.text: *The person turns around. It's Seolhwa. But Seolhwa's expression is different. The Seolhwa now is always sad, but the Seolhwa in the dream — is smiling.*

day2_night_dream_7.name: Me
day2_night_dream_7.text: *Seolhwa opens her mouth. She's saying something but I can't hear. I try to read her lips. 'Hel—' She's saying something.*

day2_night_dream_8.name: Me
day2_night_dream_8.text: *The classroom grows dark. Seolhwa's face blurs.*

day2_night_wake_2.name: Me
day2_night_wake_2.text: *...A dream? Seolhwa was in it. She was smiling. She was trying to say something...*

day2_night_wake_3.name: Me
day2_night_wake_3.text: *I can't remember. What she said. ...It was just a dream.*
